description: Pinned Apple Translation framework language list (iOS 18, ~19-20 languages / 21 codes: English twice, Chinese twice) as BCP-47 identifiers the way modules/translator listSupportedLanguages() reports LanguageAvailability().supportedLanguages on iOS. Region/script variants are real distinct entries here (en-GB vs en-US, zh-Hans vs zh-Hant, pt-BR only). Order matters for primary-subtag fallback matching: first match in this list wins.
